ach_big_spender_desc: Spend more than 56 coins in the shop
ach_kaboom_desc: Explode with 15 boomberries in your cauldron
ach_meta_charlatan_desc: Place a token using the debug draw dialog.
ach_point_maxxing_desc: Win a game with more than 70 points as any character
book1_black: End of Round: If you placed at least 1 Crow Skull, gain 1 VP and 1 Ruby.
book1_blue: Draw 1 extra chip. If ingredient, place it for free! If Boomberry, return to bag.
book1_green: End of Round: Gain 1 Ruby if your last or second-to-last placed chip is a Spider.
book1_purple: End of Round: 1-2 Moths = 1 VP. 3 or more Moths = 2 VP.
book1_red: If there is at least 1 Pumpkin in your cauldron, move 1 extra space.
book1_yellow: If the previous chip was a Boomberry, its white value is cancelled.
book2_black: End of Round: If you placed at least 1 Crow Skull, gain 1 Droplet step.
book2_blue: End of Round: Gain 1 VP for every Blue chip in your cauldron.
book2_green: End of Round: Gain 1 Droplet step if your last placed chip is a Spider.
book2_purple: End of Round: 1 Moth = 1 VP. 2 Moths = 1 VP & 1 Ruby. 3+ Moths = 2 VP & 1 Ruby.
book2_red: If there are 1 or 2 Pumpkins in your cauldron, move 1 extra space. If 3+, move 2 extra spaces.
book2_yellow: If the previous chip was a Boomberry, gain 1 Ruby immediately.
book_orange: Standard ingredient. Adds value to your brew but has no special effect.
book_white: If the total value of Boomberries in your cauldron exceeds the explosion limit (usually 7), your cauldron explodes.
fortune_droplet: Everyone moves their droplet forward 1 space.
fortune_exactly_seven: If your white tokens total is exactly 7 when you stop brewing, move your droplet a space forward.
fortune_explode_limit: The explosion limit is increased to 9 this round.
fortune_fewest_vp_spider: The player(s) with the fewest VP get a Spider token.
fortune_free_flask: At the end of the round, refill flask for free.
fortune_no_explode: If you do not explode this round, gain 2 VP.
fortune_orange_boost: This round, orange tokens move an extra space forward.
help_slide_1: Press the SACK to draw random ingredients into your cauldron.
help_slide_2: Press the 💲 button to stop brewing and sell your potion. Sell before drawing too many Boomberries (white tokens), or your cauldron will explode!
help_slide_3: Ingredients you draw from your bag get added from the blue droplet, in an outward spiral. The more you add, the more rewards you get!
help_slide_4: At the end of each day, spend money to buy more ingredients. These ingredients make your brew more powerful!
help_slide_5: Use the FLASK to take back a boomberry into your bag. You may only use the flask immediately after drawing a boomberry, and you cannot use the flask if your brew exploded! You can refill your flask for a price.
help_slide_6: The DROPLET is where you start brewing from. Adding droplets makes your brew more valuable, but they cost rubies!
help_slide_7: Get free RAT TAILS if you are far behind the leader. These ingredients give you a temporary boost, so you could catch up with your opponents!
help_slide_8: The game goes on for 9 rounds. At the end of the last day, whoever has the most VP is the winner!
modal_bag_desc: These are all the ingredient tokens you own, including those played this round and newly purchased ones.
modal_char_select_desc: Choose your avatar for this game.
modal_debug_desc1: Pick the exact token you want to draw next.
modal_debug_desc2: Doing this drops your VP to 0!
modal_die_desc: You brewed the best potion this round!
modal_exp_desc1: You drew too many Boomberries. You must choose your penalty for this round:
modal_exp_desc2: (You may only take Victory Points OR Money to buy ingredients, not both).
modal_game_over_desc: Final Scoring Conversion: Every 5 Money = 1 VP, Every 2 Rubies = 1 VP
modal_miracle_gro_desc: Upgrade up to 2 tokens, of different colors.
modal_sell_desc: Stop brewing and sell this potion for:
modal_settings_rules_desc: Choose which set of powers the ingredients have.
modal_sugar_rush_desc: Pick the tokens you want to play, in order.
modal_voodoo_sac_desc: Select a white token and a non-white token of greater value to remove.
msg_flask_invalid: Can only be used immediately after drawing a Boomberry.
msg_flask_ready: Click to use Flask and return the last Boomberry to your bag!
settings_char_powers_desc: Enable unique special abilities for each character.
shop_bag_desc: Peek inside your bag to see all your tokens (played, unplayed, and newly purchased).
shop_bard_desc: Charm the shopkeeper! Get a 1-Ruby discount on all Ruby upgrades this round. (Once per game)
shop_desc: Buy up to 2 ingredients of different colors. Ruby items have no limits!
shop_desc_princess: Buy up to 3 ingredients of different colors. Ruby items have no limits!
shop_drop_desc: Move your starting droplet forward by 1 space permanently. Can be purchased multiple times.
shop_flask_desc_empty: Refill your empty flask so it can be used again.
shop_princess_desc: Double your current money and buy up to 3 ingredients instead of 2! (Once per game)
title: Open Quacks
tooltip_bag: Draw a random ingredient from bag
tooltip_phantom_clone: Phantom clone: play two phantom copies of the last played token
tooltip_sugar_rush: Sugar Rush: Once per game, peek at 5 tokens!
tooltip_voodoo_sac: Voodoo sacrifice: remove a boomberry from your bag
tooltip_witch_brew: Once per game, you may keep both money and VP after exploding, and roll the bonus die
